prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
For transformer T-014, inspect the last 24 hours of available voltage telemetry and report whether either voltage signal deviated more than 3% from its recent mean.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should compute or reference phase-voltage imbalance over the requested window, state whether any event exceeded 3%, and include when the peak imbalance occurred.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "get_sensor_readings",
        "arguments": {
          "sensor_id": "voltage_mv",
          "transformer_id": "T-014",
          "start_time": "2024-07-25T00:00:00",
          "end_time": "2024-07-26T00:00:00",
          "limit": 1440
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-8273f53f9bf11d20",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"error\": \"No readings found for transformer='T-014' sensor='voltage_mv'.\"\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "It seems that there are no readings for the 'voltage_mv' sensor on transformer T-014. Therefore, it's not possible to determine if either voltage signal deviated more than 3% from its recent mean.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
It seems that there are no readings for the 'voltage_mv' sensor on transformer T-014. Therefore, it's not possible to determine if either voltage signal deviated more than 3% from its recent mean.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Implement a fallback or alternative data source when primary sensor data is unavailable."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Implement a fallback or alternative data source when primary sensor data is unavailable.
